name: truth_bounty_contracts

scripts.test:fuzz: forge test --match-contract WeightedStakingFuzzTest -vv && forge test --match-contract StakingFuzzTest -vv && forge test --match-contract IntegrationFuzzTest -vv
scripts.test:fuzz:extended: forge test --match-contract WeightedStakingFuzzTest --fuzz-runs 1000 -vv && forge test --match-contract StakingFuzzTest --fuzz-runs 1000 -vv

description: TruthBounty smart contracts with comprehensive fuzz testing
